detectors.description:
Integral.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (Integral.sol#1031-1059) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (Integral.sol#1033)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Integral.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Integral.transfer(address,uint256)
		Integral._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)

		Integral.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Integral.transfer(address,uint256)
		Integral._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
